mapper.select:
/* 캘린더 생성 (월별/연별 동적 처리) */ WITH RECURSIVE calendar AS ( SELECT
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
AS m_date
UNION ALL
SELECT
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
FROM calendar WHERE
m_date < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
m_date < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
),
/* 실제 데이터 집계 */ stat_data AS ( SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(q.reg_dt, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(q.reg_dt, '%Y-%m')
AS join_date , COUNT(q.bbs_pst_oid) AS inquiry_cnt FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst q INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs b ON q.bbs_oid = b.bbs_oid WHERE q.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND q.del_yn = 'N' AND b.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND b.stats_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
/* 검색 기간 필터링 */ AND q.reg_dt >=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND q.reg_dt <=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-12-31 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(q.reg_dt, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(q.reg_dt, '%Y-%m')
)
/* 최종 조회 */ SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m')
AS searchDate , IFNULL(sd.inquiry_cnt, 0) AS inquiryCnt FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN stat_data sd ON
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y') = sd.join_date
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m') = sd.join_date
ORDER BY c.m_date ASC
